title: Resuscitation support apparatus and method for an infant
abstract: A resuscitation support apparatus (10) for an infant includes a base component (12) and a support member (14) comprising a height adjustment mechanism. The base component (12) is configured to position an upper torso and head of the infant. The height of the support member (14) is adjustable to change the angle of the head relative to the upper torso, so as to provide airway patency.
claims: Claims 1. A resuscitation support apparatus for an infant, the resuscitation support apparatus comprising: a base component and a support member comprising a height adjustment mechanism, wherein the base component is configured for positioning an upper torso and head of an infant; and wherein the height of the support member is adjustable to change the angle of the head relative to the upper torso so as to provide airway patency. 2. The resuscitation support apparatus according to claim 1 , wherein the apparatus comprises a first configuration in which the base component and the support member are substantially planar, and a second configuration in which the support member is configured to protrude from the base component. 3. The resuscitation support apparatus according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the height adjustment apparatus is configured to facilitate manual adjustment. 4. The resuscitation support apparatus according to any preceding claim, wherein the support member comprises an inflatable portion comprising an inflatable chamber. 5. The resuscitation support apparatus according to claim 4, wherein the support member comprises multiple inflatable chambers. 6. The resuscitation support apparatus according to claim 4 or 5, further comprising a valve in communication with the inflatable portion of the support member. 7. The resuscitation support apparatus according to any of claims 4 to 6, wherein the apparatus further comprises an inflation arrangement to provide inflation to the inflatable portion of the support member. 8. The resuscitation support apparatus according to any of claims 2 to 7, wherein the apparatus in the first configuration is configured to be foldable. 9. The resuscitation support apparatus according to any of claims 2 to 8, wherein the apparatus in the second configuration is configured to be foldable. 10. The resuscitation support apparatus according to any preceding claim, wherein the base component comprises wings configured to swaddle an infant. 11. The resuscitation support apparatus according to any preceding claim, wherein the base component comprises a head portion for locating the head of an infant relative to the support member. 12. The resuscitation support apparatus according to any preceding claim, wherein the base component comprises a pliable material. 13. The resuscitation support apparatus according to any preceding claim, wherein the apparatus is configured to be reusable. 14. The resuscitation support apparatus according to claim 13, wherein the base component and support apparatus comprise a material or materials that can be washed in temperatures up to 90Â°C. 15. The resuscitation support apparatus according to any preceding claim, further comprising a layer of absorbent material. 16. The resuscitation support apparatus according to claim 15, wherein the layer of absorbent material is provided on a surface of base component. 17. The resuscitation support apparatus according to claim 15 or 16, wherein the layer of absorbent material is detachably coupled to the base component. . 18. The resuscitation support apparatus according to any of claims 15 to 17, wherein the layer of absorbent material comprises a hood portion configured for enveloping an infantâs head. 19. The resuscitation support apparatus of any preceding claim, further comprising a heating component. 20. The resuscitation support apparatus of claim 19, wherein the heating component comprises at least one of an electrical heating component, a water based heating component and an instant heat pack. 21. The resuscitation support apparatus of any preceding claim, wherein the apparatus comprises operational instructions on a portion of the apparatus, wherein the operational instructions are provided to be visible while the apparatus is in use. 22. The resuscitation support apparatus of any preceding claim, wherein the apparatus comprises outline markings to ensure correct positioning of the infant for resuscitation. 23. A method of supporting an infant during resuscitation, the method comprising: providing a resuscitation support apparatus according to any of claims 1 to 22; positioning an infant back down on the base component of a resuscitation support apparatus; adjusting the of the support member to change the angle between the infantâs head and upper torso to provide airway patency. 24. The method of claim 20, further comprising: arranging the resuscitation support apparatus into a first configuration which is substantially planar; adjusting the support member to protrude from the base component to elevate the infantâs upper torso relative to the head.
